_note: v0.3 Item 8 extended: bind:value dispatches the target type from (tag, literal type attribute). <input type='number'> → number; <input type='range'> → number; <input> / <input type='text'> / <textarea> → string. Simple-identifier targets (`let x: T = ...`) skip the check — the definite-assign rewrite widens their flow type to any. Member expressions (`state.x`) survive since they skip the rewrite.
